spec.objective: Make the copy sound like it understands month-end close work.

diagnose.main_issue: The draft sounds like category marketing instead of close-operations knowledge.

rewrite.central_claim: Finance teams need fewer month-end checks and clearer approvals, not another dashboard story.
edits: Lead with what finance teams actually need rather than product adjectives.
Name close workflow details like approvals, ERP checks, and spreadsheets.
Turn the copy into an operator-facing claim instead of a generic platform description.

remaining_risks: Could name one more specific close step for an even sharper operator feel.
